decisions.runtime_policy: List operations expose the registry only through Nexusctl runtime-tool guardrails. The command does not grant access to a concrete tool by itself.
Show operations expose metadata only through Nexusctl runtime-tool guardrails. The command does not bypass domain or tool capability checks.
Check operations require runtime.tool.invoke before evaluating the concrete tool capability, domain boundary, live-trade approval and destructive-deny rules.

non_runtime_manual_review_items.note: VP-10 resolves the critical runtime-tool review gap only. Other imported command names remain non-authoritative hints unless a later phase explicitly promotes them.
